svg.title: PhantomFlow: ML-based covert channel and C2 detection in encrypted traffic
svg.desc: Pipeline showing how PhantomFlow detects threats inside TLS-encrypted traffic using only metadata and behavioral features without decryption
svg.text: PhantomFlow — ML covert channel detector in encrypted traffic

g.text: Zero decryption — detects threats purely from packet metadata and flow behavior
TLS 1.3 / QUIC / DNS-over-HTTPS / HTTPS · fully encrypted end-to-end
Passive traffic capture (AF_PACKET · XDP kernel hook · Zeek agent)
Network interface tap — no inline proxy, no MitM, no certificate injection
JA3 / JA4 hash → known malware fingerprint DB · Shodan IP enrich · ASN reputation
Wazuh alert · PCAP session export · attack graph visualizer
Full session timeline with feature contributions (SHAP explainability)
